# Rank Point Media

> A two-person digital agency in San Antonio, TX. Rank Point Media (a DBA of JSL Innovations LLC) builds custom-coded websites and runs local SEO, Google Ads, and digital marketing for small businesses across the San Antonio metro, surrounding cities, and the rest of Texas. The owners — Jon Michael (web development, technical SEO) and Stacie Michael (design, marketing, social) — are the only people clients ever talk to. There are no account managers and no offshore subcontractors.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://rankpointmedia.com/) — value proposition, services overview, pricing summary, consultation booking
- [About](https://rankpointmedia.com/about) — Jon and Stacie's bios, how the agency operates, the husband-and-wife team
- [Services](https://rankpointmedia.com/services) — full service list
  - [Website Design](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/website-design) — custom-coded responsive websites
  - [Local SEO](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/local-seo) — San Antonio local search rankings
  - [Google Ads (PPC)](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/ppc-google-ads) — paid search management
  - [Social Media](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/social-media) — content and community management
  - [AI Search Optimization](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/ai-search-optimization) — citations in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews
  - [Brand Management](https://rankpointmedia.com/services/reputation-management) — review management and online reputation
- [Pricing](https://rankpointmedia.com/pricing) — Build + Hosting (monthly, 12-month term): Starter $99/mo, Business $149/mo, Growth $249/mo. Build Only (one-time, client owns and hosts): Starter $500, Business $1,000, Growth $1,500.
- [Industries](https://rankpointmedia.com/industries) — sectors served
- [Case Studies](https://rankpointmedia.com/case-studies) — past work with metrics
- [Blog](https://rankpointmedia.com/blog) — essays on web, SEO, and small-business marketing
- [Contact](https://rankpointmedia.com/contact) — booking, phone, email

## Key facts

- Location: San Antonio, TX
- Phone: (210) 305-7372
- Email: info@rankpointmedia.com
- Service area: San Antonio, Leon Springs, Boerne, Helotes, Fair Oaks Ranch, New Braunfels, plus remote engagements across Texas
- Tagline: "Higher rankings. More customers."
- Ownership: DBA of JSL Innovations LLC; husband-and-wife team
- Team size: two people, both client-facing on every engagement
- Pricing posture: published rates, no "starting at" hooks, no "contact us for pricing"
